crundec_bottom_mb10_reverse.description: CRunDec example states m_b(10 GeV)=3.610 GeV maps to m_b(m_b)=4.163 GeV with alpha_s(M_Z)=0.1189; reverse fixed-nf audit uses m_b(m_b)=4.163 to 10 GeV.
crundec_bottom_mb10_reverse.interpretation: fixed-nf coefficient subset is useful but not full RunDec parity; full adapter must provide alpha_s(MZ) running/threshold/matching protocol.

rundec_v3_charm_mc3.description: RunDec v3 example ledger lists m_c(m_c)=1.279 GeV and m_c(3 GeV)=0.986 GeV under full RunDec-style running/decoupling context.
rundec_v3_charm_mc3.interpretation: fixed-nf coefficient subset is useful but not full RunDec parity; full adapter must provide alpha_s(MZ) running/threshold/matching protocol.

claim: v77 validates that the v76 fixed-nf 4-loop evaluator is not full RunDec parity; a real RunDec/CRunDec adapter or full alpha_s(MZ)+threshold evaluator is required.
